profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Distribusi Voucher Nusantara Tbk provides digital products, payment solution services, and online-to-offline (O2O) platforms in Indonesia. The company offers smart EDC/unified payment system; self-service vending machines; LockerIn that assists visitors who want to leave items and retrieve items with a self-made pin or QR receipt; Dolan, an online-onsite ticketing and point of sales system to maximize tourism business management; Parkour, an integrated parking ecosystem solution with cashless payment; point of sales (POS); and Diva intelligent instant messaging platform. It also engages in the development, industry, service, agriculture, land transportation, trade of new motorcycle, workshop, and printing; travel agency; land transportation; telecommunication and development of trading application via internet; and wholesale trade of telecommunication equipment and activities. In addition, the company provides software and hardware technology services in the financial industry. PT Distribusi Voucher Nusantara Tbk was founded in 2003 and is based in Kuningan, Indonesia.
